title: Create clothing photo analyzer with outfit pairing suggestions

requirements.text: Create a photo upload interface that allows users to capture or select photos of individual clothing items from their device
acceptanceCriteria: User can take a new photo using their device camera
User can select existing photos from their device storage
Uploaded photos are displayed as a preview before submission

requirements.text: Store uploaded clothing item photos in the backend with metadata including upload timestamp and user identifier
acceptanceCriteria: Photos are persisted in the backend canister
Each photo has a unique identifier
Photos can be retrieved by user

requirements.text: Implement backend logic to analyze clothing photos and generate outfit pairing suggestions based on color compatibility, clothing type, and style matching

quotes: provides the most possible pairs of cloths to wear

acceptanceCriteria: System identifies clothing types from photos (e.g., shirt, pants, dress, jacket)
System suggests compatible clothing pairs based on matching rules
Pairing suggestions are returned as a list of combinations

requirements.text: Display a gallery view of all uploaded clothing items organized by category or upload date
acceptanceCriteria: All uploaded clothing photos are visible in a grid or list layout
Users can view their complete wardrobe collection
Photos are clearly labeled or categorized

requirements.text: Create an outfit suggestions view that displays recommended clothing pairs with visual previews showing both items side by side

quotes: provides the most possible pairs of cloths to wear

acceptanceCriteria: Each outfit pair shows both clothing items together
Multiple pairing suggestions are displayed
Users can easily browse through different outfit combinations

requirements.text: Implement a matching algorithm that considers complementary colors, appropriate clothing combinations (tops with bottoms, outerwear with base layers), and generates the maximum number of valid outfit pairs from the available wardrobe

quotes: most possible pairs of cloths to wear

acceptanceCriteria: Algorithm produces multiple valid outfit combinations
Pairings follow logical clothing combination rules (e.g., tops with bottoms)
System maximizes the number of suggested pairs from available items

requirements.text: Design a modern, fashion-forward visual theme with warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream, warm browns) and elegant typography that reflects style consciousness and wardrobe organization, with a clean, magazine-inspired layout that emphasizes visual content
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm, sophisticated tones throughout the interface
Typography is elegant and readable
Layout emphasizes photo content with generous whitespace
Overall aesthetic feels premium and fashion-oriented

constraints: Use only React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for frontend implementation
Backend must be implemented in Motoko with single-actor architecture
Do not integrate external AI services or third-party APIs for image analysis
nonGoals: Integration with e-commerce platforms or shopping services
Social sharing features or community outfit ratings
Closet organization or clothing inventory management beyond pairing suggestions

required: Fashion hanger icon illustration in warm terracotta color (hanger-icon.dim_120x120.png)
Outfit pairing placeholder image showing two clothing item silhouettes side by side in sage green (outfit-placeholder.dim_400x300.png)
Upload clothing hero banner with minimalist wardrobe aesthetic in cream and warm brown tones (upload-hero.dim_1200x400.png)
